title: viola reichei
intro: Viola reichei, also known as the purple pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Viola reichei include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Viola reichei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory symptoms.
